content.speakerText: I need to reschedule a day off this week.
expectedAnswers: Could I reschedule my day off to Friday? I have a family dinner planned.
I'd like to move my day off to Thursday — something came up at home.
Is it okay if I swap my day off to Tuesday? I have an important errand to run.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：清楚说明需要调整休假日期
语言准确性：使用了正确句型（Could I / I'd like to / Is it okay if）
表达自然度：语气礼貌，符合职场沟通习惯
关键词覆盖：使用了 'reschedule', 'move', 'swap', 'day off', 合理原因
